'''Vi Callen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] c. [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. He was sympathetic to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. He was one of the Senators who [[Obi-Wan Kenobi's Senate hearing|investigated]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] involvement in the death of [[Bruck Chun]].

{{Char-stub}}
